_MWCAP_AUDIO_SIGNAL_STATUS Struct Reference
Structures

MWCAP_AUDIO_SIGNAL_STATUS. More...

#include <MWCaptureExtension.h>

Collaboration diagram for _MWCAP_AUDIO_SIGNAL_STATUS:
[legend]

Public Attributes

WORD wChannelValid
 Valid audio channel mask.The lowest bit indicates whether the 1st and 2nd channels are valid, the second bit indicates whether the 3rd and 4th channels are valid, the third bit indicates whether the 5th and 6th channels are valid, and the fourth bit indicates whether the 7th and 8th channels are valid. More...
 
BOOLEAN bLPCM
 Whether the signal is LPCM. More...
 
BYTE cBitsPerSample
 Bit depth of each audio sampling. More...
 
DWORD dwSampleRate
 Sample rate. More...
 
BOOLEAN bChannelStatusValid
 Whether channel status is valid. More...
 
IEC60958_CHANNEL_STATUS channelStatus
 The audio channel status. More...
 

Detailed Description

MWCAP_AUDIO_SIGNAL_STATUS.

Records audio signal status.
Related functions is
MWGetAudioSignalStatus

Member Data Documentation

BOOLEAN _MWCAP_AUDIO_SIGNAL_STATUS::bChannelStatusValid

Whether channel status is valid.

BOOLEAN _MWCAP_AUDIO_SIGNAL_STATUS::bLPCM

Whether the signal is LPCM.

BYTE _MWCAP_AUDIO_SIGNAL_STATUS::cBitsPerSample

Bit depth of each audio sampling.

IEC60958_CHANNEL_STATUS _MWCAP_AUDIO_SIGNAL_STATUS::channelStatus

The audio channel status.

DWORD _MWCAP_AUDIO_SIGNAL_STATUS::dwSampleRate

Sample rate.

WORD _MWCAP_AUDIO_SIGNAL_STATUS::wChannelValid

Valid audio channel mask.The lowest bit indicates whether the 1st and 2nd channels are valid, the second bit indicates whether the 3rd and 4th channels are valid, the third bit indicates whether the 5th and 6th channels are valid, and the fourth bit indicates whether the 7th and 8th channels are valid.
